zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Narna Mousall於1632年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可時，她的父親Thomas Sperry34歲，母親Jane Trice32歲。她於大約1668年與Henry Tolls在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1676年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Narna Mousall于1632年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可时，她的父亲Thomas Sperry34岁，母亲Jane Trice32岁。她于大约1668年与Henry Tolls在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1676年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Narna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, Nanna, a derivative of nanþ ‘daring’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Narna Mousall was born in 1632, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Sperry, was 34 and her mother, Jane Trice, was 32. She married Henry Tolls about 1668, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1676, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Narna Mousall est née en 1632, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Sperry, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jane Trice, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Tolls environ 1668, à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1676, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Narna Mousallが1632年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークで生まれた時，父Thomas Sperryは34歳，母Jane Triceは32歳であった。約1668年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州でHenry Tollsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1676年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで44歳で死去した。

ko.Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Narna Mousall(이)가 1632년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Sperry(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Trice(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1668년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 Henry Tolls(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1676년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Narna Mousall nasceu em 1632, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Sperry, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jane Trice, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Tolls aproximadamente 1668, em Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1676, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Narna Mousall родилась в 1632 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Sperry было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Trice, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Tolls около 1668 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1676 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 44 лет.
